dialogue.text: Hi!  I'm Queri Lilibit. Alchemist, Transmuter, Fiend Researcher and Faerie Fencer!
I highly recommend the combat school if you're new here... it could save your life.
I also run an Alchemy Shop in town, you should come visit sometime!
My party members, Nia and Ashe are always doing crazy things... I'm always worried about them.
I'm a Fiend researcher, did you know that?  I graduated from the Riannon Institute of Alchemy.
No... I don't personally know Camielelileananu...  not every Alchemist is her friend you know.
Fiends are always evil, but people forget that...  a veteran expeditioner died recently because they forgot that...
Fiends just want to deceive you... but I heard some rumors of people who were fiends that regained their sanity and state of mind.
Is such a thing possible?  Its just stories from the east....
People who eat Astra Sporocarps can exhibit fiend-like abilities.  It changes you.
Don't forget to bring smoke flasks!  They're a lifesaver.
My favorite food?  I love meat stew with berries.  But lately I've been craving Chorpa Steaks.  Have you had it?
The director?  I've never met them... I don't think anyone even knows what they look like.
